name: Dirt
recipeIngredient: 2 large instant vanilla pudding mixes (6 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the softened cream cheese with powdered sugar until smooth.
2. In another bowl, mix instant pudding mix with milk (do not use cooked pudding).
3. Add the pudding mixture to the cream cheese-sugar blend and stir until combined.
4. Fold in the Cool Whip and vanilla extract.
5. Crush chocolate cookies into fine crumbs using a food processor or sifter.
Assembly:
1. Place a layer of cookie crumbs at the bottom of a clean 10-inch flower pot, pressing them down evenly to eliminate air pockets.
2. Spread the cream filling over the crumbs, packing it well.
3. Repeat layers alternating between more crumbs and cream until nearly full, finishing with a layer of crumbs on top.
4. Refrigerate for 1-2 hours before serving.
5. When ready to serve, arrange fresh flowers in the center of the pot (wrap stems tightly).
6. For kids, use small shovels to dig into the dessert and "plant" gummy worms among the dirt.
